adaptation_note: Find OUTBOUND DROPPED connections from this source host (10.0.0.5) to EXTERNAL destinations only (exclude RFC1918 internal ranges) over the last 2 hours. We're looking for the host's pattern of attempted external connections that the firewall denied - so action=drop is required, RFC1918 destinations must be excluded.
reference_query: python3 scripts/tools/wazuh_cli.py query --query 'rule.groups:(firewall OR iptables) AND data.srcip:10.0.0.5 AND data.action:drop AND NOT data.dstip:(10.0.0.0/8 OR 172.16.0.0/12 OR 192.168.0.0/16)' --window 2h
